app_layout.sidebar: col-span-1 border-r border-white/10 h-full overflow-y-auto bg-[#0A0A0A]

components.navigation: Sticky header with Crystal Glass effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Must include Logo, GitHub Avatar, and Logout CTA.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-neutral-200. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5.
components.file_tree: Custom HTML/Tailwind. Items must be flex rows, items-center. Use JetBrains Mono for file names. Indent with ml-4 per level. Hover state: bg-white/5 rounded-md cursor-pointer. Icons: lucide-react (ChevronRight, ChevronDown, Folder, File).
components.repo_list: Vertical list in sidebar. Dense spacing (py-2 px-3). Active state: bg-white/10 text-white. Inactive: text-neutral-400 hover:text-neutral-200 hover:bg-white/5.
components.login_page: Central bento card on an absolute dark background. Use a subtle grid pattern for the background to mimic tech lighting. GitHub login button should be prominent.

icons.usage: Use thin, scalable strokes. Minimal usage to keep the interface clean.

image_urls.description: Abstract neon dark composition to be used as a heavily darkened (opacity-10) background texture on the login page to add depth.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets 4.5:1 ratio. Avoid pure #000000 next to pure #FFFFFF.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add data-testid to login button, repo list items, file tree items, and logout button.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Ensure the app strictly follows a Dark Mode theme matching the Linear/Vercel aesthetic.
2. Implement GitHub OAuth for login. The landing page should have a 'Connect GitHub' button.
3. After login, show a dashboard. Sidebar on the left containing the list of repositories, main area on the right showing the file tree.
4. Use the GitHub REST/GraphQL API to fetch user repositories and file tree (contents API or tree API) WITHOUT downloading files to disk. Only display.
5. Use 'lucide-react' for all icons (Folder, File, ChevronRight, ChevronDown).
6. Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Prefer 'Outfit' or 'Geist'. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for file names in the tree.
7. Borders should be 1px and very subtle (white/10). No bulky shadows.
8. Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
